cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. So we have a golf tournament with five golfers: Rob, Amy, Joe, Eve, and Dan. The task is to figure out their finishing order based on the given clues and then determine which of the options (A) to (E) is correct regarding who finished second-to-last. First, let me list out all the given information: 1. Rob finished below Dan.
